subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! By the life of God, hearts and souls have melted away, and the pillars have been consumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه لعمر الله قد ذابت الافئده و القلوب و احترقت الارکان
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @rejection, opposition and persecution
